headline: Testing The Truce
summary: Mixed U.S. stock market updates as yields fall and oil slides on Hormuz traffic rebound. Read more about real estate data here.

headline: Morgan Stanley Says Apartment REIT Pullback Creates Opportunity, Raises MAA Target
summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Passive Income. Top 100 Places Where the Rich People Own Real Estate On June 25, Morgan Stanley raised its price recommendation on Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) to $155 from $150. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. […]
